languages.text: "Мы проводили время в молитве Бессмертному. Без сна и пищи, довольствуясь в перерывах лишь замороженными кристаллами льда..."

traits.locale_text: "Мы проводили время в молитве Бессмертному. Без сна и пищи, довольствуясь в перерывах лишь замороженными кристаллами льда..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Мы проводили время в молитве Бессмертному. Без сна и пищи, довольствуясь в перерывах лишь замороженными кристаллами льда..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."
languages.original_text: "Мы проводили время в молитве Бессмертному. Без сна и пищи, довольствуясь в перерывах лишь замороженными кристаллами льда..."

traits.locale_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Wir verbrachten viel Zeit damit, zum Unsterblichen zu beten, verzichteten auf Nahrung und Schlaf und ernährten uns nur von Eiskristallen..."
languages.original_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."

languages.text: "Nous avons passé du temps à prier l'Immortel, à nous priver de nourriture et de sommeil, à nous nourrir uniquement de cristaux de glace..."
languages.original_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."

languages.text: "我们花时间向神仙祈祷，不吃饭也不睡觉，只靠冰晶维持生命......"
languages.original_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."

languages.text: "Nos pasamos el tiempo rezando al Inmortal, privándonos de comida y sueño, manteniéndonos sólo con cristales de hielo..."
languages.original_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."

languages.text: 「仙人に祈り、食事も睡眠も絶ち、氷の結晶だけで自活して過ごした......」。
languages.original_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."

languages.text: "Zamanımızı Ölümsüz'e dua ederek, yemekten ve uykudan mahrum kalarak, buz kristallerinden başka bir şeyle beslenmeyerek geçirdik..."
languages.original_text: "We spent time praying to the Immortal, depriving shunning both food and sleep, sustaining ourselves with nothing but ice crystals..."
